_comment: This is a starter/minimal SDXL workflow used by Lorelai's camera code. The C# code loads and mutates it at runtime (checkpoint, positive/negative prompt, seed, resolution, etc.). You can replace the contents of this file with a real export from ComfyUI (right-click the canvas or use the 'Save (API Format)' option after building a simple txt2img graph that uses your cyberrealisticPony checkpoint). Keep the same general node structure or update the node ids in Program.cs if you change them.
